title: Better Level
description: This mod make leveling up system linear.
body:
This mod make leveling up system linear.

In vanilla, experience requires per level are nonlinear.

Higher level require more xp to the next level.

For example, to get from level 1 to level 10 only requires 160 xp. But get from level 39 to level 40 requires 193 xp.

This leads to a lot of waste of xp on cost level of other mods, or just vanilla enchant.

 
**Value can be customized in server config:**

* **Xp requires per level (default:46, the average to get from level 0 to level 30)**
* **Xp increases per level (default: 0)**
 

**other versions will in future.(for now, we have 1.16.5 1.18.2 forge; 1.18~1.18.2 fabric)**
